messages.text: Hey Alex, quick question — do you have budget approval for the Datadog upgrade? We need to decide before the vendor meeting Thursday.
The deploy pipeline is green again. Root cause was a flaky integration test — I've quarantined it for now.
Shared the updated onboarding mockups in the design channel. @alex would love your feedback on the new flow before we finalize.
Heads up — the auth migration load test showed 2x latency increase at peak. I'm investigating but might need to push the rollout.
PR #247 is updated with all review feedback. Ready for final approval when you get a chance.
